subtitle.en: Beyond Ashta Kuta --- chart-level factors that determine real compatibility
subtitle.hi: अष्ट कूट से परे --- वास्तविक अनुकूलता निर्धारित करने वाले कुण्डली-स्तरीय कारक

s1Title.hi: अष्ट कूट से परे --- कुण्डली-स्तरीय विश्लेषण

s1Desc.en: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.
s1Desc.hi: अष्ट कूट (36 अंक) छानबीन परीक्षा है --- आवश्यक किन्तु पर्याप्त नहीं। 28+ अंक वाले अनेक दम्पतियों का विवाह कठिन होता है; 18 अंक वाले कुछ सफल होते हैं।
s1Desc.sa: अष्टकूटः (36 अङ्काः) परीक्षणम् --- आवश्यकं किन्तु न पर्याप्तम्।
s1Desc.ta: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.
s1Desc.te: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.
s1Desc.bn: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.
s1Desc.kn: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.
s1Desc.mr: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.

s1Desc.mai: Ashta Kuta (36 points) is the SCREENING test --- necessary but not sufficient. Many couples with 28+ points have troubled marriages; some with 18 points thrive.

kutaScreening.en: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.hi: कूट मिलान छानबीन है। नीचे के 6 कारक गहन विश्लेषण हैं।
kutaScreening.sa: कूटमिलनं परीक्षणम् अस्ति। अधोलिखिताः षट् कारकाः गभीरविश्लेषणाय सन्ति।
kutaScreening.ta: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.te: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.bn: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.kn: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.gu: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.
kutaScreening.mai: कूट मिलान छानबीन है। नीचे के 6 कारक गहन विश्लेषण हैं।
kutaScreening.mr: Kuta Milan is the screening test. The 6 factors below are the deep dive.

house7Insight.en: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.hi: 7वाँ भाव साझेदारी का दर्पण है। जब दोनों कुण्डलियों के 7वें भाव सामंजस्यपूर्ण हों, दम्पति प्रेम में "एक ही भाषा बोलते हैं"।
house7Insight.sa: 7वाँ भाव साझेदारी का दर्पण है। जब दोनों कुण्डलियों के 7वें भाव सामंजस्यपूर्ण हों, दम्पति प्रेम में "एक ही भाषा बोलते हैं"।
house7Insight.ta: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.te: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.bn: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.kn: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.gu: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.
house7Insight.mai: 7वाँ भाव साझेदारी का दर्पण है। जब दोनों कुण्डलियों के 7वें भाव सामंजस्यपूर्ण हों, दम्पति प्रेम में "एक ही भाषा बोलते हैं"।
house7Insight.mr: The 7th house is the mirror of partnership. When both charts' 7th houses are harmonious, the couple "speaks the same language" in love.

venusInsight.en: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.hi: शुक्र की स्थिति कूट अंक से ऊपर है। 30/36 कूट किन्तु दोनों शुक्र पीड़ित --- 20/36 किन्तु दोनों शुक्र बलवान से अधिक कठिन।
venusInsight.ta: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.te: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.bn: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.kn: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.gu: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.
venusInsight.mai: शुक्र की स्थिति कूट अंक से ऊपर है।
venusInsight.mr: Venus condition trumps Kuta score. A couple with 30/36 Kuta but both Venus afflicted will struggle more than a couple with 20/36 but strong Venus in both charts.

d9Insight.en: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.hi: D9 आपके विवाह कर्म का एक्स-रे है। D1 (राशि कुण्डली) बाहरी जीवन दिखाती है; D9 बन्द दरवाज़ों के पीछे क्या होता है।
d9Insight.sa: D9 भवतः विवाहकर्मणः X-रश्मिचित्रम् इव अस्ति।
d9Insight.ta: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.te: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.bn: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.kn: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.gu: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.
d9Insight.mai: D9 आपके विवाह कर्म का एक्स-रे है।
d9Insight.mr: D9 is like an X-ray of your marriage karma. D1 (Rashi chart) shows the outer life; D9 shows what happens behind closed doors.

dashaInsight.en: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.hi: सर्वोत्तम दृष्टिकोण: पूरक दशाएँ जहाँ एक साथी निर्माण करे और दूसरा सहारा दे।
dashaInsight.sa: श्रेष्ठः उपायः: पूरकाः दशाः यत्र एकः सहचरः निर्माणं करोति अन्यश्च सहयोगं ददाति।
dashaInsight.ta: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.te: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.bn: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.kn: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.gu: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.
dashaInsight.mai: सर्वोत्तम दृष्टिकोण: पूरक दशाएँ जहाँ एक साथी निर्माण करे और दूसरा सहारा दे।
dashaInsight.mr: Best approach: complementary dashas where one partner builds and the other supports. Identical challenging dashas compound stress.

mangalDoshaNote.en: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.hi: लग्न या चन्द्र या शुक्र से भाव 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 में मंगल से मंगल दोष बनता है। तीनों सन्दर्भ बिन्दुओं से जाँचें।
mangalDoshaNote.sa: लग्नात् चन्द्रात् शुक्रात् वा भावेषु 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 मङ्गलः मङ्गलदोषं रचयति।
mangalDoshaNote.ta: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.te: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.bn: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.kn: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.gu: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.
mangalDoshaNote.mai: लग्न या चन्द्र या शुक्र से भाव 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 में मंगल से मंगल दोष बनता है।
mangalDoshaNote.mr: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna OR Moon OR Venus creates Mangal Dosha. Check from ALL THREE reference points — most apps only check Lagna.

doubleMangalInsight.en: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable. The "mutual cancellation" principle is the most common real-world fix.
doubleMangalInsight.hi: दोहरा मंगल दोष (2+ सन्दर्भ बिन्दुओं से) अधिक प्रबल है और अधिक निरसन चाहिए। एक दोष एक निरसन के साथ = प्रबन्धनीय।
doubleMangalInsight.sa: दोहरा मंगल दोष (2+ सन्दर्भ बिन्दुओं से) अधिक प्रबल है।
doubleMangalInsight.ta: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.
doubleMangalInsight.te: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.
doubleMangalInsight.bn: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.
doubleMangalInsight.kn: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.
doubleMangalInsight.gu: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.
doubleMangalInsight.mai: दोहरा मंगल दोष (2+ सन्दर्भ बिन्दुओं से) अधिक प्रबल है।
doubleMangalInsight.mr: Double Mangal Dosha (from 2+ reference points) is stronger and requires more cancellation. Single Dosha with one cancellation = manageable.

finalInsight.en: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.hi: कोई कुण्डली पूर्ण नहीं है। यदि 6 में से 5 कारक अनुकूल हों, विश्वास से आगे बढ़ें। शेष कारक सचेत विकास का क्षेत्र बनता है।
finalInsight.ta: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.te: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.bn: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.kn: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.gu: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
finalInsight.mai: कोई कुण्डली पूर्ण नहीं है। यदि 6 में से 5 कारक अनुकूल हों, विश्वास से आगे बढ़ें।
finalInsight.mr: No chart is perfect. If 5 out of 6 factors align, proceed with confidence. The remaining factor becomes the area for conscious growth together.
